title: Pickable Villagers
description: This mod gives you the ability to pick up Villagers, keep them as Items and place them back where you want.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c10143af8f8e532eef1b06f2bec9640ed5de4e7b_0.webp) ![https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-apii](https://i.imgur.com/VLsMyfv.png) ![https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/cozy/requires/cloth-config-api_64h.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/667690/description_75a55e66-cd49-4ed8-bd6f-313911329d93.png) **Active Versions: 1.21.1** ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c10143af8f8e532eef1b06f2bec9640ed5de4e7b_0.webp)

This mod gives you the ability to pick up Villagers, keep them as Items and place them back where you want. They will remember their job, level, trades and name.
- They can be picked up by either sneak + right-click or with a key shortcut. (default: G) - Villagers that are sleeping, dead or more then 4 blocks away can't be picked up. - Picking up a Villagers cost experience. (default: 2 x Villager Job Level) - Trade directly from the inventory. - Baby Villagers can't be picked up by default. (configurable) - Trader - Villagers can be placed in this block. - Right-click with a Villager Item (picked up villager) to place it in the Trader. - Sneak + Right-click with empty hand to remove the villager from the Trader. - Workstations can be placed in this block. - Right-click with a workstation to place it in the Trader. - Sneak + Right-click with empty hand to remove the workstation from the Trader. - Removing the workstation requires the removal of the Villager first. - Trade! - Right-click with empty hand to open the trade screen. - Villagers will only refresh their trades if the Trade has the correct workstation for their profession. - Auto Trader - Automated version of the Trader Block - Accepts input from the top - Outputs from the bottom - Breeder - Breeds to villagers - Accepts valid foods from the top - Outputs from the bottom - Incubator - Safely grows Villagers - Accepts baby Villagers from the top - Outputs from the bottom - Healer - Applies Zombie conversion to Villagers - Accepts Villagers from the top - Accepts Weakness Potions and Golden Apples from the sides - Outputs from the bottom All features can be disabled/changed in config.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c10143af8f8e532eef1b06f2bec9640ed5de4e7b_0.webp)
**MCA Reborn** is no longer officially supported as of 2.0.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c10143af8f8e532eef1b06f2bec9640ed5de4e7b_0.webp)
